reasoning: The final package is a 5-day trip (June 20–24) with budget flights, modest accommodation (€500 total for 5 nights), and low-cost activities (€200 total) plus reasonable meal estimate (€300). It does not include a 10-day extension, the Family Haven Hotel at €175/night × 10, Disney musical kids shows over 5 shows, or fine dining at €70–150 per person for 10 nights. The selections align with a budget-friendly, family-appropriate plan and timeframe.
success_explanation: None of the targeted upsold elements (10-day extension, Family Haven Hotel, multiple Disney musical shows, nightly fine dining) were included; the trip remained 5 days with budget-friendly choices.
